name: nvim-context-mcp
description: Context MCP bridge that lets Claude Code inspect visible Neovim context.

interface.shortDescription: Read visible Neovim context from Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Expose visible windows, buffers, cursor locations, and selected editor metadata from live Neovim instances through a read-only MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Use my Neovim context to explain the visible code.
Review what I have open in Neovim.
Help with the code currently visible in Neovim.
